## Tip PR checklist

<!-- CI will validate schema, content rules, and duplication. Fix any CI failures before requesting review. -->

- [ ] File is at `tips/<stack>/<kebab-title>.md`
- [ ] Frontmatter includes `title`, `stack`, `tags`, `language`, `author.github`, `author.name`, `publishedAt`
- [ ] No `id` field — CI assigns it at merge
- [ ] Code block comes **first** in the body, prose explanation second
- [ ] Code is ≤ 25 lines
- [ ] Explanation is ≤ 600 chars

## What does this tip teach?

<!-- One sentence: what non-obvious thing does a reader learn? -->

## Why is this non-obvious?

<!-- What footgun, hidden behavior, or tradeoff does this reveal? -->
